chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-6381 of 2021 ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Date Order with signature of Judge ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1. For orders on Misc. No.27201/2021 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objection No.04 & 18. 3. For orders on Misc. No.27202/2021 (Ex/A). 4. For hearing of main case -------------------------------------------------------------- 29.10.2021. Mr. Khalilullah Jakhro, advocate for the petitioner. >><< 1. Urgency granted. 2to4. Learned counsel states that the petitioner has filed representations/petitions dated 13.04.2021 and 21.05.2021 for reinstatement in service before the respondent No.2, which even after passage of substantial time have not been considered/decided. Learned counsel states that the petitioner would be satisfied and would not press this petition, if directions are issued to the respondent No.2 to consider and decide the representations/petitions filed for reinstatement in service by the petitioner within a shortest possible time in accordance with law. Mr. Ali Safdar Depar, A.A.G. present in Court in some other matter has waived notice and has given no objection, if this petition may be disposed of on the said prayer made by the counsel for the petitioner. In view of the above, the instant petition is disposed of along with the listed application by directing the concerned respondent to consider and decide the said representations/petitions filed by the petitioner within a period of two months in accordance with law from the date of the receipt of this order.

Ali Safdar Depar, A.A.G. present in Court in some other matter has waived notice and has given no objection, if this petition may be disposed of on the said prayer made by the counsel for the petitioner. In view of the above, the instant petition is disposed of along with the listed application by directing the concerned respondent to consider and decide the said representations/petitions filed by the petitioner within a period of two months in accordance with law from the date of the receipt of this order. JUDGE JUDGE Gulzar/PA
